section_title: Meaning of "contributory".-- The term "contributory" means every person liable to contribute to the assets of a
content:
237. Meaning of "contributory".-- The term "contributory" means every person liable to contribute to the assets of a
company in the event of its being would up, and, in all proceedings for determining and in all proceedings prior to the final
determination of the persons who are to be deemed contributries, includes any person alleged to be a contributory.
